mapper.select:
select a.id as article_id, a.title, a.short_title, a.url_slug, a.offical_stat, a.topping_stat, a.status, a.cream_stat, a.picture as cover, a.update_time, u.user_id as author, u.user_name as author_name,u.photo as author_avatar from article a left join user_info u on a.user_id = u.user_id
order by a.update_time desc, a.id desc
select count(*) from article a left join user_info u on a.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.sql: select a.id as article_id, a.user_id as author_id, u.user_name as author_name, a.title, a.short_title, a.url_slug, a.summary, ad.content, a.status, a.offical_stat, a.topping_stat, a.deleted, ca.column_ids, a.update_time from article a left join user_info u on a.user_id = u.user_id left join ( select d.article_id, d.content from article_detail d inner join ( select article_id, max(version) as version from article_detail where deleted = ${@com.github.paicoding.forum.api.model.enums.YesOrNoEnum@NO.code} group by article_id ) latest on latest.article_id = d.article_id and latest.version = d.version where d.deleted = ${@com.github.paicoding.forum.api.model.enums.YesOrNoEnum@NO.code} ) ad on ad.article_id = a.id left join ( select article_id, group_concat(column_id) as column_ids from column_article group by article_id ) ca on ca.article_id = a.id
